summary: Tested Admin Clienti Analisi Panel for Evolution PRO OS. All backend APIs (13/13 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly. The panel allows admin to manage cliente_analisi users: list with filters, view details, generate AI analysis, save, download PDF, and update call status.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/clienti-analisi - Lists all clienti with stats
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/clienti-analisi/{user_id} - Returns cliente details
✅ Backend: POST /api/admin/clienti-analisi/{user_id}/genera-analisi-ai - Generates AI analysis using Claude
✅ Backend: POST /api/admin/clienti-analisi/{user_id}/salva-analisi - Saves analysis to database
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/clienti-analisi/{user_id}/analisi-pdf - Downloads PDF (reportlab)
✅ Backend: POST /api/admin/clienti-analisi/{user_id}/stato-call - Updates call status (da_fissare, fissata, completata)
✅ Backend: Invalid stato-call returns 400 error
✅ Backend: Non-existent cliente returns 404
✅ Frontend: Admin login works via 'Sei già Partner? Accedi' modal
✅ Frontend: Clienti Analisi panel accessible from sidebar
✅ Frontend: Table shows columns: Nome, Cognome, Contatti, Quest., Pag., Analisi, Call, Aggiornato, Azioni
✅ Frontend: Filter buttons work: Tutti, Questionario ✓, Pagato, Da generare, Analisi pronte, Call da fissare
✅ Frontend: Stats cards show correct counts
✅ Frontend: Search input present
✅ Frontend: Click 'Apri' opens cliente detail modal
✅ Frontend: Modal shows 3 sections: Dati Cliente, Stato Processo, Risposte Questionario
✅ Frontend: Stato Processo shows flow: questionario_compilato → pagamento_analisi → analisi_generata → call status
✅ Frontend: 'Genera Analisi Strategica' button available for eligible clienti
✅ Frontend: 'Analisi Salvata' section shows for clienti with saved analysis
✅ Frontend: 'Visualizza/Modifica' button opens analysis editor
✅ Frontend: Analysis editor textarea with data-testid='analisi-editor'
✅ Frontend: 'Salva Analisi' button with data-testid='btn-salva-analisi'
✅ Frontend: 'Scarica PDF' button with data-testid='btn-scarica-pdf'
✅ Frontend: 'Stato Call Strategica' section shows current call status
seed_data_creation: Used existing test cliente att2_1773352332@test.com (ID: 0aad124a-4fd2-4159-b75a-86b3481ddb5f) with pagamento_analisi=true and analisi_generata=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Clienti Analisi Panel fully functional. All CRUD operations work: list clienti with filters, view details, generate AI analysis (Claude), save analysis, download PDF (reportlab), update call status. Test cliente att2_1773352332@test.com has completed the full flow (questionario → pagamento → analisi → call completata). The panel is accessible via sidebar 'Clienti Analisi' after admin login.

verified_features.table_columns: WORKING - Nome, Cognome, Contatti, Quest., Pag., Analisi, Call, Aggiornato, Azioni
verified_features.quick_filters: WORKING - Tutti, Questionario ✓, Pagato, Da generare, Analisi pronte, Call da fissare
verified_features.cliente_detail_modal: WORKING - 3 sections: Dati Cliente, Stato Processo, Risposte Questionario
verified_features.genera_analisi_ai: WORKING - Generates personalized analysis using Claude AI
verified_features.stato_call: WORKING - Updates call status (da_fissare, fissata, completata)
